error.signature: Execution failed for task ':app:mergeDebugResources'. Resource compilation failed

verdict.summary: Android resource merge failed. Duplicate resources, invalid XML, or AAPT2 crash.

dead_ends.why_fails: Clean removes build cache but does not fix the underlying resource conflict
Masks the issue temporarily; the resource conflict still exists and will reappear

workarounds.action: Check the full error output for specific resource conflict
workarounds.how: Run: ./gradlew mergeDebugResources --stacktrace  # shows exact conflicting resource

workarounds.action: Search for duplicate resource names across modules and libraries
workarounds.how: grep -r 'resource_name' app/src/main/res/  # check for duplicates in values/, drawables, etc.

workarounds.action: Invalidate caches and restart (File > Invalidate Caches)
workarounds.how: Android Studio: File > Invalidate Caches > Invalidate and Restart
